VULKAN RENDERER QUICK INTEGRATION GUIDE
======================================

1. Build / Package
   - Add this folder as a submodule or copy into your project tree.
   - Run `./scripts/compile_shaders.sh` once to generate SPIR-V binaries.
   - Build `libvkrenderer.a` with `make` (or include the sources directly in your own build).
   - Link your application with the static library plus Vulkan + SDL2 (see Makefile for flags).

2. Initialise (replacement for SDL_CreateRenderer)
   ```c
   #include "vk_renderer.h"
   #include "vk_renderer_sdl.h"

   VkRenderer renderer;
   VkRendererConfig cfg;
   vk_renderer_config_set_defaults(&cfg);
   VkResult ok = vk_renderer_init(&renderer, sdlWindow, &cfg);
   SDL_assert(ok == VK_SUCCESS);

   // Store &renderer anywhere you previously stored SDL_Renderer*.
   ctx->renderer = &renderer;  // ctx was holding SDL_Renderer* before.
   ```

3. Frame Loop (drop-in for SDL_RenderClear / SDL_RenderPresent)
   ```c
   int winW, winH;
   SDL_GetWindowSize(sdlWindow, &winW, &winH);
   vk_renderer_set_logical_size(&renderer, (float)winW, (float)winH);

   VkCommandBuffer cmd;
   VkFramebuffer fb;
   VkExtent2D extent;
   VkResult r = vk_renderer_begin_frame(&renderer, &cmd, &fb, &extent);
   if (r == VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR || r == VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR) {
       vk_renderer_recreate_swapchain(&renderer, sdlWindow);
       continue;
   }

   // existing SDL_Render* calls now map to Vulkan via the compat macros
   SDL_SetRenderDrawColor(ctx->renderer, 32, 64, 128, 255);
   SDL_RenderFillRect(ctx->renderer, &someRect);

   vk_renderer_end_frame(&renderer, cmd);
   ```

4. Textures (SDL_ttf or surfaces)
   ```c
   SDL_Surface* glyph = ...;  // SDL_ttf output
   VkRendererTexture tex;
   vk_renderer_upload_sdl_surface(&renderer, glyph, &tex);

   SDL_Rect dst = {x, y, glyph->w, glyph->h};
   vk_renderer_draw_texture(&renderer, &tex, NULL, &dst);
   vk_renderer_texture_destroy(&renderer, &tex);
   ```

5. Shutdown (replacement for SDL_DestroyRenderer)
   ```c
   vk_renderer_shutdown(&renderer);
   ```

6. Extras / Notes
   - If shader files fail to load, define `VK_RENDERER_SHADER_ROOT` to the folder
     that contains `shaders/` in your build system.
   - Window resize: call `vk_renderer_recreate_swapchain(&renderer, sdlWindow)` when you receive
     `VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR` **or** `VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR`, or if SDL reports a resize.
     High-DPI windows sometimes trigger `SUBOPTIMAL` even though the swapchain still renders.
   - Logical size: call `vk_renderer_set_logical_size` whenever your window size changes so UI
     code using layout coordinates stays in sync with the swapchain extent.
   - Validation: enabled by default in debug builds; automatically disabled if unavailable
     (common on vanilla macOS). Install Homebrew `vulkan-validationlayers` and set `VK_LAYER_PATH`
     to re-enable.
   - Keep the SDL window creation (`SDL_CreateWindow` with `SDL_WINDOW_VULKAN`) exactly as before;
     the Vulkan layer sits on top of it.
   - If you prefer to migrate off the compat macros later, call `vk_renderer_*` functions directly
     (`vk_renderer_draw_line`, `vk_renderer_fill_rect`, etc.).
